events.label: assistant
events.text: Wrote the assessment to `/app/answer.json`. Summary: the broken bond pattern (head joints stacking instead of offsetting, estimated ~15% overlap vs. the required ~25%/1-quarter-unit minimum) is judged a **fail** — non-compliant per TMS 402/602, which requires supplemental horizontal reinforcement or bond beams (≤48" o.c.) when masonry isn't laid in running bond. Risk rated **medium** since it's caught at rough-complete stage and is correctable via EOR-directed reinforcement or relaying before grout/closeout, rather than an immediate life-safety hazard.
